creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gerald->danfe

This is a bit of a duplicate of ports/119155 but with a concrete patch. 
danfe was so kind to offer into OPTIONizing this (which is more general) 
so I am reassigning this PR to him. 

That said, I have spent some hacking today to add a --without-cups 
configure options to Wine itself and submitted this to the upstream 
maintainer of Wine.  When this has been accepted (possibly in updated 
form) we can then use it also in our port.
